evals.title: Status transition not enforced — need validation rule
evals.prompt: An agent closed a case without filling in any resolution notes. The case jumped from New straight to Closed. How do I prevent this?
expected_topics: Case.Status picklist transitions are not platform-enforced
validation rule with ISPICKVAL(Status, 'Closed') and ISBLANK(Resolution__c)
Lightning Path for guided transitions
Status Category distinction

evals.title: CaseMilestone auto-created by entitlement process — do not insert manually
evals.prompt: I wrote an Apex trigger that inserts CaseMilestone records when a case is created, but I'm getting INSUFFICIENT_ACCESS_OR_READONLY errors. What's wrong?
expected_topics: CaseMilestone records are auto-created by the Entitlement Process
do not manually insert CaseMilestone
set Case.EntitlementId to trigger auto-creation
update CompletionDate to complete a milestone

evals.title: EntitlementId required for SLA milestone creation
evals.prompt: We set up an Entitlement Process with First Response and Resolution milestones, but no CaseMilestone records are being created on new cases. What configuration is missing?
expected_topics: Case.EntitlementId must be populated
SlaProcess must be active and linked to the entitlement
auto-entitlement lookup via Flow or Setup setting
entry criteria on the SlaProcess

evals.title: EscalationRule fires on case age not status change
evals.prompt: I set up an escalation rule but it's escalating cases that are already being worked on. I expected escalation to only happen if the status hasn't moved to Working. Why is it still firing?
expected_topics: EscalationRule evaluates elapsed time from CreatedDate, not status transitions
Case.IsEscalated is set by rule engine based on age threshold
add status-based criteria to EscalationRuleItem to exclude Working cases
business hours affect elapsed time calculation

evals.title: CaseComment.IsPublished customer visibility
evals.prompt: A support agent added an internal note on a case with some sensitive internal pricing information. It appeared on the customer portal. How did this happen and how do I prevent it?
expected_topics: CaseComment.IsPublished = true makes comments visible on the customer portal
IsPublished defaults to false
bulk DML operations may accidentally set IsPublished = true
review automation and data loads that create CaseComment records

evals.title: EmailMessage ThreadIdentifier threading — new case created instead of reply
evals.prompt: Customers are replying to our support emails but instead of updating the existing case, Salesforce is creating duplicate new cases for each reply. How does Email-to-Case threading work and what can cause it to break?
expected_topics: ThreadIdentifier embedded in email subject and footer
token stripped by customer's mail client breaks threading
EmailMessage.Incoming = true for inbound messages
duplicate case detection and mitigation

evals.title: Case.Origin importance for routing and SLA
evals.prompt: A team member changed Case.Origin on a set of existing cases from Email to Phone after they were created. Now the SLA metrics look wrong. Is changing Origin after creation safe?
expected_topics: Case.Origin drives assignment rules and entitlement process entry criteria
changing Origin after creation does not retroactively re-apply assignment or SLA
entitlement process entry criteria may branch on Origin
set Origin correctly at intake

evals.title: ServiceContract vs Entitlement distinction
evals.prompt: A customer has a premium support contract covering three product lines with different response times for each. Should I create one Entitlement or multiple? What's the relationship between ServiceContract and Entitlement?
expected_topics: ServiceContract is the commercial agreement; Entitlement defines specific coverage
one ServiceContract can have multiple Entitlement children via ServiceContractId
separate Entitlement per product line or SLA tier
each Entitlement links to its own SlaProcess

evals.title: IsClosed is formula — set Status to close a case
evals.prompt: I'm writing an Apex class to close cases in bulk. I tried setting case.IsClosed = true but it won't compile. What's the correct way to close a case via Apex?
expected_topics: IsClosed is a formula field — cannot be set via DML
set case.Status to a value whose Status Category is Closed
compile error when attempting to write IsClosed directly
re-open by setting Status to an Open category value

evals.title: AssignmentRuleItem child records required for rule to work
evals.prompt: I created a Case Assignment Rule and marked it active, but cases are all going to the default owner instead of being routed to the correct queues. The rule looks configured correctly in the UI. What should I check?
expected_topics: CaseAssignmentRule is the container; routing criteria live on child AssignmentRuleItem records
rule with no AssignmentRuleItem records routes to default owner
query AssignmentRuleItem to verify criteria exist
AssignmentRuleHeader must be set in Apex DML options

evals.title: Web-to-Case assignment rule activation
evals.prompt: Our assignment rules route cases perfectly when created manually in Salesforce, but cases submitted through our web form all go to the default owner. What setting controls this?
expected_topics: Web-to-Case bypasses assignment rules unless explicitly enabled
Setup > Service > Web-to-Case > Assign Cases to Case Assignment Rules checkbox
Email-to-Case routing address sets queue directly per routing address
validate channel settings after any assignment rule change
must_contain: Assign Cases to Case Assignment Rules

evals.title: Case merge irreversibility
evals.prompt: We accidentally merged the wrong two cases together. The non-master case is now read-only and the customer history is on the wrong master case. Can we undo the merge?
expected_topics: case merge is irreversible — no unmerge via UI or API
MasterRecordId is set on child cases and cannot be cleared
CaseComment and EmailMessage are re-parented to master case
validate merge candidates carefully; no undo path
